      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu eſt ta Lewijatana
Galwas fatreezis/ tu eſt to par
Barribu dewis teem Landim
Tukneſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu eſt weenu Awoti un
Uppt ar Schkelſchanu darrijs/
tu eſt iſkaltejs warrenaß Uppeß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tew peederr Deena un
Nakts/tu eſt Galſimu un San-
li pataiſijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu eſt tai Semmei wiſ-
fas Rohbeschaf lizzis/ Waffaru
un Seemu eſt tu darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Peeminini ſcho / ka tas
Eenatdneeks to KUNGU neewa/
un Geſſu Landis ſaimo tawn
Wahrdu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne nodohd tawas Uhbe-
les Dwehfelt tam Swehram /
tawu behdiſu Bulku ne aiſmir-
ſat muhſcham.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Peeminini tahs Derribas/
jo tahs Seinmes Allas irr par
Slepkauihas Bedrehm tappu-
chas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Lai tas Apbehdfnahks ar
Kaunu ne aiseet/ lai tee Behdi-
gce un Nabbagee tawu Wahr-
da flawe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zellees Deews/ iſteefa
tawas Teefas-Leetas/ peeminini
tahs Neewaschanas/ kas tew no
teem Geſkeem noteek zaur augo-
fchu Deenn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne aiſmirſti tawn Pretti-
neeku Sauſschann/ ta Trohſne-
chana to/ kas prett tewi zelkahs/
weenumebr lahpi us augſchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 75,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weena Dſeesma/ eelfſch fa Dahwids ta �
GA Kriſtus un tahs kriſtitas Drau

das irr: 5/7. Warreni nogahſch/ un

tohs Meelas dohd iſdert: 8. Uu ap

"

      "text": "Eena Affawa Di
ima/ no ta augſta D
dataja dſeedama:
Samaita.
2. Mehſ pateizam t
Deews/ mehs pateizam/ ka ta

3. Jo kad es ihſtu Laiku pr
tiſchu/ tad es itt taisni foḥ

5. Es fazziju us teem Gr
neem: Ne greſnojeetees/ un-

6. Ne leeliieetees ar Warru

8. Bet Deews irr Sohgj
kas tcho paſemmo/ un ohtru p

weens Bifkeris Rohkā/ ar ſi
ru Wihnu papillam ſajaukt
